message:
fix(h2): count reserved streams toward max_concurrent_streams per RFC 7540 §5.1.2

StreamState::is_active() excluded ReservedLocal/ReservedRemote, allowing
push-promise reserved streams to bypass the concurrent stream limit.
Fixed by adding reserved states to is_active() and updating tests to
properly transition streams from Idle to Open via send_headers().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
